tr.td: Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Vitamin B12 and/or vitamin B12 derivative-containing product
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Development of individualized plan of care
Referral to home health care service

ul.li: Patient will achieve and maintain optimal glycemic control through lifestyle modifications including diet, exercise, and self-monitoring.
Patient will achieve a weight reduction of at least 5% from baseline to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
Patient will maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.

tr.td: Vaccine product containing only Influenza virus antigen (medicinal product)
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
